[Subagent Task]: 快速扫描 /mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/ 目录，列出所有关键文件的路径和功能描述（一行），用 200 字以内。

- src/main/xxx.ts → [功能]
- src/preload/xxx.ts → [功能]
- src/renderer/src/components/xxx.tsx → [功能]
- src/renderer/src/pages/xxx.tsx → [功能]
- src/renderer/src/services/xxx.ts → [功能]
- src/renderer/src/stores/xxx.ts → [功能]

只列文件路径和一行功能描述，不要分析代码内容。

Let me get the full content of key files to understand what each does. I'll read a few key files to understand their functionality.

arguments.command: for f in /mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/main/*.ts /mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/preload/*.ts /mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/renderer/src/components/*.tsx /mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/renderer/src/pages/*.tsx /mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/renderer/src/services/*.ts /mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/renderer/src/stores/*.ts; do echo "=== $f ==="; head -5 "$f"; done

content.text:
## 扫描结果（/mnt/d/aafuzhi/axs/src/）

### src/main/
- src/main/index.ts → [Electron主进程入口，窗口管理]
- src/main/aiService.ts → [AI服务IPC处理器，转发AI请求]
- src/main/backupService.ts → [项目备份/恢复IPC处理器]
- src/main/yamlService.ts → [YAML安全读写与序列化]

### src/preload/
- src/preload/index.ts → [暴露安全API给渲染进程]

### src/renderer/src/components/
- src/renderer/src/components/Workbench.tsx → [主工作台，布局+菜单+文件操作]
- src/renderer/src/components/Editor.tsx → [Monaco编辑器封装]
- src/renderer/src/components/OutlineTree.tsx → [章节大纲树状导航]
- src/renderer/src/components/AnalysisPanel.tsx → [章节分析：摘要/人物/对话/情节点]
- src/renderer/src/components/AIToolsPanel.tsx → [AI工具集：续写/扩写/润色/风格迁移等]
- src/renderer/src/components/FactsPanel.tsx → [事实台账管理，伏笔看板]
- src/renderer/src/components/CharacterGraph.tsx → [人物关系力导向图可视化]
- src/renderer/src/components/VectorSearchPanel.tsx → [向量语义检索，相似章节搜索]
- src/renderer/src/components/ProjectManager.tsx → [项目管理：创建/打开/列表]
- src/renderer/src/components/ExportManager.tsx → [导出管理：Markdown/EPUB]

### src/renderer/src/pages/
- src/renderer/src/pages/AppSettingsPage.tsx → [应用设置：API密钥/模型/主题]
- src/renderer/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx → [世界观设定列表页]
- src/renderer/src/pages/SettingDetail.tsx → [世界观设定详情编辑]
- src/renderer/src/pages/CharactersPage.tsx → [角色列表卡片页]
- src/renderer/src/pages/CharacterDetail.tsx → [角色详情编辑页]

### src/renderer/src/services/
- src/renderer/src/services/aiModels.ts → [AI模型选择服务]
- src/renderer/src/services/factExtractor.ts → [章节事实自动提取]

### src/renderer/src/stores/
- src/renderer/src/stores/index.ts → [Zustand全局状态管理]
